hook.name: LendingHookV4
hook.description: A lending AMM hook that manages a full-range ETH/TOKEN LP position as a collateralized borrowing vault. LPs deposit ETH and TOKEN to earn swap fees; borrowers post TOKEN collateral for ETH loans at 40% LTV. Skims a 0.5% protocol fee on each swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and blocks swaps in any block where a liquidation occurred.
